canonical_definition: Backdoor attack method using smooth image warping to create human-imperceptible triggers, evaluated for its effectiveness in low-variance directions of data distribution.
papers: Demystifying Poisoning Backdoor Attacks from a Statistical Perspective
VDC: Versatile Data Cleanser based on Visual-Linguistic Inconsistency by Multimodal Large Language Models
